summaryGuide.editorHighlightText: Conduct comprehensive processing, integration, and in-depth analysis of audio files and multiple documents to generate high-value reports structured in a professional five-section format: Executive Summary, Key Business Analysis, Overview of Attached Document Data, Meeting Outcomes and Action Plan, and Strategic Action Recommendations.
summaryGuide.keyboardInputDescription: After switching to input mode, you can send your requirements along with audio and documents to the AI agent
summaryGuide.messageEditorDescription: After entering your requirements, the AI agent will comprehensively summarize combining audio, documents, and other content
summaryGuide.realTimeRecordingDescription: Live transcription and key point extraction. Generates full meeting minutes automatically.
summaryGuide.selectProjectDescription: You can select an existing project to initiate real-time recording summary
summaryGuide.startRecordingDescription: Start real-time recording directly, and you can also set the recording source to "Microphone" and "Computer Audio"
summaryGuide.uploadAttachmentDescription: Supports uploading audio files and multiple documents, deeply integrating information and intelligently extracting core summaries for you
summaryGuide.uploadAudioDescription: Upload local audio files for AI transcription and efficient content analysis.
summaryGuide.uploadAudioFileDescription: Initiate speech-to-text conversion and summarize and analyze the content
summaryGuide.uploadDocumentAndAudioDescription: Upload reference docs with audio to generate deep, context-rich summaries.

ui.aiGeneratedTip: The above content is generated by AI, please verify

ui.editorFooterTip: * Recording notes will be used during summarization
ui.editorPlaceholder:
In your notes, you can freely record:

Meeting Points: Topics, participants, key conclusions
Core Vocabulary: Meeting keywords, professional terms
Inspiration Sparks: Sudden ideas, to-dos, follow-ups

During summarization, AI will integrate your notes and recording content to provide you with comprehensive and accurate summaries/reviews.
ui.editorTitleTip: Notes will be saved to project files after summarization

onboarding.basicDescription: When something goes wrong, errors will appear here. You can send them to Agent for a quick fix.
onboarding.basicErrorTipDesc: Runtime errors and warnings from the app are automatically displayed here so you can see what went wrong.
onboarding.basicSendTipDesc: When you see an error, just click the send button on the right to let Agent fix it automatically — no technical knowledge needed.
onboarding.basicSwitchHint: Need more debugging tools? Click the toggle in the top-right to switch to Advanced Mode.
onboarding.consoleTipDesc: The Console tab captures all logs and errors from the app.
onboarding.description: View your app's runtime status and quickly locate and fix issues.
onboarding.evalTipDesc: Type JS expressions in the Console input to debug the app state.
onboarding.insertTipDesc: Select multiple log entries, then insert them into the chat input to send to Agent.
onboarding.networkTipDesc: The Network tab shows all network requests and response statuses.
onboarding.sendTipDesc: When you encounter an error, click the send button on the entry — Agent will analyze and fix it.
onboarding.title: DevConsole Guide
